post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 171: TTS Mafia

The flavor will be based on the youtube series "If the Emperor had a Text-to-Speech Device", a parody series of Warhammer 40k. Watching it would be helpful.
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLyiDf91_bTEgnBN0jAvzNbqzrlMGID5WA&disable_polymer=true

Of particular importance will be the following two shorts. It is highly recommended that you watch them. They are short videos and will not take very long to watch and are very entertaining.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HKoEH2R9z90
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UhduvvA_Xpo

Story
Genestealers have infiltrated the hive city. The imperial citizens of the city must root out the threats within in order to save their city. IN THE NAME OF THE MAN EMPEROR OF MANKIND.




Rules
  • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary. Any violations of the Book of Judgement should be reported to the moderator.
  • 1.2: Do not post at night.
  • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
  • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • 1.7: If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • 1.8: If you are not a part of this game, do not post in this thread.
  • 1.9: If any player receives 3 warnings, they will be modkilled.
  • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
  • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
  • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
  • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
  • 2.9: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • 2.10: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • 2.11: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • 3.1: Each day will be 504 hours (3 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
  • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 504 hours has occurred.
  • 3.4: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
  • 3.5: The night deadline will be 120 hours after night begins.
  • 3.6: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • 3.7: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
  • 3.8: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
  • 3.9: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
  • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • 3.11: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • 3.12: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
  • 3.13: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.


It is the duty of all responsible citizens to report all violations of the Book of Judgement.

The Book of Judgement
The word of the Man Emperor of Mankind is law.
Do not refer to the Man Emperor in a negative manner.
You may only consume tacos on Friday.
Do not insult the Civilian Relief Rations
Do not post pictures of technologies lacking imagery of the Imperial Aquila.
Do not make more than 18 posts within 25 hours, unless 12 of those 18 posts have been made in a 2 hour period.
Do not post a picture of your room if it is not coated in gold wallpaper.
Do not have more than 3 sentences in a post which are more than 20 words long but lack a conjunction.
Do not use the word lunch, unless the post also contains the word taco or tacos.
Do not eat raw promethium.
Do not sell prune juice to someone who is not a member of the High Lords of Terra.
You must make at least two posts containing a prime number of emojis on nonprime numbered days.
You may not make a post with more than four periods in a row.
You may not imply that tacos are contained within Civilian Relief Rations.
You must refer the Sons of Guilliman as smurfs.
Do not post any pictures of Grey Knights.
Do not make jokes about brass.
Do not do anything which is not considered to fail to be in noncompliance with the rules.
Do not make posts that have between 1000 and 1570 words.
Do not make any statements that are in support of Tau.
Do not mention Malal.
Do not post 4 instances of the character "1" consecutively.
No more than 3 consecutive sentences can have endings that rhyme, except when all sentences rhyme.
Do not reveal or pretend to reveal non public, non mechanical information that is derived from your role pm.
Do not advocate for the eating of tacos on Tuesday.
Do not make a post with more emojis than there are spaces.
Do not use the word geniosity.
Do not use more than four of the @ symbol in a post.
Do not post in bolded color.
Do not have a doge portrait.
Do not profane the taco.
Do not make a post where the number of spaces is less than twice the sum of the number of emojis and the number of periods.
You must make a post at least once every 170 hours.
Do not make any statements in support of deadline hang.
Make at least 15 posts in one mafia day.
Prime numbered posts must have exactly 3 emojis in it.
Do not do Gentlemanly things.
If someone makes a post containing the word "warp" and a subsequent post made by a different person contains the word "hijinks", then the two players will be forced to participate in an Ultra-Game where they will compete in a game of Paradox-Billiards-Vostroyan-Roulette-Fourth-Dimensional-Hypercube-Chess-Strip Poker. The loser will be expelled from the planet and exiled to Ultramar.
Do not make posts that contain more than 5 vowels in a row.
Do not use more than 10 emojis in one post.
You must make at least 2 posts in a day that contain a prime number of prime digits.
Do not start more than 3 sentences in a row with the word "the".
Do not make more than 10 posts during a day that have a triangular number of emojis.
Do not make more than 12 five letter words in a post.

sorry to sound so pushy e, but can you quote this post and type this paragraph in the quotes, thanks

"Be patient till the last. Romans, countrymen, and lovers! hear me for my cause, and be silent, that you may hear: believe me for mine honour, and have respect to mine honour, that you may believe: censure me in your wisdom, and awake your senses, that you may the better judge. If there be any in this assembly, any dear friend of Caesar's, to him I say, that Brutus' love to Caesar was no less than his. If then that friend demand why Brutus rose against Caesar, this is my answer: —Not that I loved Caesar less, but that I loved Rome more. Had you rather Caesar were living and die all slaves, than that Caesar were dead, to live all free men? As Caesar loved me, I weep for him; as he was fortunate, I rejoice at it; as he was valiant, I honour him: but, as he was ambitious, I slew him. There is tears for his love; joy for his fortune; honour for his valour; and death for his ambition. Who is here so base that would be a bondman? If any, speak; for him have I offended. Who is here so rude that would not be a Roman? If any, speak; for him have I offended. Who is here so vile that will not love his country? If any, speak; for him have I offended. I pause for a reply. Then none have I offended. I have done no more to Caesar than you shall do to Brutus. The question of his death is enrolled in the Capitol; his glory not extenuated, wherein he was worthy, nor his offences enforced, for which he suffered death. Here comes his body, mourned by Mark Antony: who, though he had no hand in his death, shall receive the benefit of his dying, a place in the commonwealth; as which of you shall not? With this I depart,—that, as I slew my best lover for the good of Rome, I have the same dagger for myself, when it shall please my country to need my death."

what even is a professional jobber

OK this is kinda long, so summary
PJ is a type of JOAT, with 2-shot BP and 4 abilities, vig, cop, doc, and RB. PJ can activate any number each night. Different amounts of ability activation have different probabilities.
1: 50% nothing, 50% works
2: 25% nothing, 25% random retargets, 50% works
3: 50% random retargets, 50% works
4. 75% random targets, 25% works

This is based on memory, so the odds might be wrong.

post_rendered:
I am making this post to head off a question in advance, which I know I will get.

This game had 2 mafia, 1 cult leader, and 12 town. This may seem very imbalanced to you. Indeed, having 2 mafia and 1 third party in a 15 player game is usually imbalanced and ordinarily I would have put 3 mafia in this game. However, due to a variety of factors, having 2 mafia was more appropriate for this game.

1. The Book of Judgement. This is a strong tool for the mafia to utilize which allows them to perform many additional kills. Indeed, mafia almost won this game, the loss was due to him making an invalid report, thus failing to get Madelyn killed at the end. The Book of Judgement greatly strengthened the mafia team.

2. The existence of cult. In a normal game, town should have a 50% win rate and mafia should have a 50% win rate. With cult in the game, the win rates for town and mafia should both drop to 33% to be balanced. Note that in a game with SK, it is essentially impossible to give the SK a 33% win rate, so those games usually end up as 45/45/10. However, with a cult, it is possible to bring town and mafia win rates down to 33%. So indeed, it is harder for mafia to win this game as they would an ordinary game. The lower win rate is intended.

3. Technically, this game is balanced because everyone has a 0% chance of winning.

post_rendered:
Roles

You are an Inquisitor, a member of The Holy Orders of the Emperor’s Inquisition which defends humanity for the many dangers of the galaxy.
Every night you may investigate a player and determine whether they are showing signs of Chaos corruption.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.


You are the Grand Provost Marshal of the Adeptus Arbites.
Every night you may make a new law and have it added to the Book of Judgement.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.

You are a member of the Adeptus Astartes. You are the bulwark defending humanity from its many enemies.
Every night you may choose someone to kill. You are also able to survive one attack.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.

You are a member of the Adeptus Custodes.
You are able to kill a person during the night, but because you wish to return to the side of the Emperor quickly, you will only kill one person during this entire game. Since you no longer wear armor to show your devotion to the Emperor, you are not protected from night attacks. However, because of your devotion you will not fall to the temptations of Chaos.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.

You are a member of the Adeptus Administratum. You help keep the imperial bureaucracy running .
During the night you may choose one person and target him with the power of paperwork to make sure he is unable to do anything during the night except working on paperwork.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.

You are a Priest of the Adeptus Ministortum.
Every night you may choose one person and deliver the word of the Man Emperor to him.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.

You are an Unsanctioned Psyker. Your psyker powers are vast but the dangers of the warp are many. You use your abilities carelessly and though you can obtain great results, you also face many dangers. Your great power can protect you from two attacks (2-Shot Bulletproof).
You have 4 abilities: Cop, Doctor, Roleblocker, Vigilante
Every night you may use any combination of those abilities. However, the more abilities you use, the more likely it is for you to screw up.
1 ability used:
50% chance success
50% chance no action made
2 abilities used:
50% chance success
25% chance no action made
25% chance you target a random other person instead
3 abilities used
25% chance success
50% chance no action made
25% chance you target a random other person instead
4 abilities used
25% chance success
25% chance no action made
50% chance you target a random other person instead
Random.org will be used once to determine what happens. If it is a success, all actions succeed. If it is a fail, then all actions fail. If it is a hit random person, all actions will hit a random person which will be separately determined for each action.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.


You are an Imperial Citizen
You have no power other than your vote.
You win when there is only Imperials (Town) left in the game.


You are a Genestealer. You are here to infiltrate humanity and prepare it to be consumed by the hive fleet.
Every night you make talk with your partner here and discuss a person to kill.
You win when all remaining players are Genestalers (Mafia)


You are a Cult Leader. You serve Khorne, the god of blood, war, and murder.
Every night you may convert one person to join your cult. If you die, then all of the cult members will go into a killing frenzy. A number of non cult players, randomly selected, will die equal to the amount of remaining cult members.
You win when a majority of the players are part of the cult.
